---
title: "animated_figure_drafts"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(gganimate)
library(rgl)
library(rayshader)
library(rlang)
library(plotly)
library(ggimage)
```

```{r}
coral <- read_csv(here::here("..", "eds-coral-data-storage-management", "analysisdata", "coral_demography_analysis_data.csv"), guess_max = 10000)
```
```{r}
# coral_colors <- c(
#     Acr = "blue", 
#     Poc = "red", 
#     Por = "darkgreen", 
#     Mil = "darkorange",
#     dead = "grey"
#   )
coral_colors <- c(
  "Poc" = "#F4A6C0",  # light pink
  "Por" = "#D4A017",  # gold
  "Acr" = "#E63946",  # light red
   "Mil" = "#FF7F2A",
    "Dead" = "grey2",
  "Recruit" = "green"
)


```


```{r}

# vol %>% 
#   filter(site == "LTER1", habitat == "BR") %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x,y_scaled, group = coral_number)) +
#   geom_point(aes(color = taxa, size = volume_scaled), show.legend = FALSE) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = coral_colors) +
#   facet_grid(taxa~transect) +
#   theme(aspect.ratio = 0.2) +
#   transition_states(year,
#     transition_length = 2,
#     state_length = 1) +
#   labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}')
```

```{r}
# images <- list.files(path = here::here("animated_figures", "images"), pattern="png", full.names = TRUE, include.dirs =  TRUE)
# 
# img_df <- data.frame(taxa = c("Acr", "Mil", "Poc", "Por"),
#                      image = images)
# 
# coral_img <- left_join(coral_volume_mod, img_df)
```
```{r}
# coral_img %>% 
#   filter(site == "LTER1" & 
#            habitat == "BR" & 
#            transect == "T03" &
#            !is.na(length) &
#            taxa != "Por") %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x,y_scaled, group = coral_number)) +
#   geom_image(aes(image = image, size = volume)) +
#   theme_light() +
#   theme(aspect.ratio = 0.2) +
#   scale_size(range = c(0.02, 0.2), 
#            name = "Volume (cm³)",
#            trans = "log") +
#   theme_light() +
#   transition_states(year,
#     transition_length = 2,
#     state_length = 3) +
#   transition_states(year,
#     transition_length = 2,
#     state_length = 1) +
#   labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}')
```

## POC FIG
Assign volumes to dead corals to visualize
```{r}

```

Denote dead and recruit corals
```{r}

```

Assign images
```{r}
# images_poc <- list.files(pattern="png", include.dirs =  TRUE)
# 
# img_df_poc <- data.frame(taxa_class = c("Acr", "Mil", "Poc_dead", "Poc_recruit", "Poc", "Por"),
#                      image = images_poc)
# 
# coral_poc_img <- left_join(poc_dyn, img_df_poc)
```

```{r}
coral_death <- coral %>% 
  group_by(coral_id) %>%
  arrange(coral_id, year) %>% 
  mutate(current_volume = case_when(
    is.na(size_t0) ~ size_t_minus1,
    TRUE~ size_t0
  ),
  survival = case_when(
    dyn_death == 1 ~ 0,
    is.na(l) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ 1
  )) %>% 
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# coral_dyn <- coral_death %>%
#   mutate(taxa_class = case_when(
#     dyn_death == 1 ~ "Dead",
#     dyn_recruitment == 1 ~ "Recruit",
#     TRUE ~ taxa
#   ))

coral_dyn <- coral_death %>%
  mutate(taxa_class = case_when(
    dyn_death == 1 ~ "Dead",
    TRUE ~ taxa                # keep original taxa for recruits
  ))

```

Create figure
```{r}
# plot <- coral_dyn %>% 
#   filter(x < 1 & 
#            site == "LTER1" &
#            habitat == "OR" & 
#            transect == "T01" &
#            !is.na(current_volume)
#          ) %>% 
#   mutate(y_m = y / 100) %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x, y_m)) +
#   geom_point(aes(color = taxa_class, size = current_volume + 5, group = coral_id)) +
#   geom_point(aes(color = taxa, size = current_volume, group = coral_id)) +
#   scale_size(range = c(0.01, 5), 
#            name = "Volume (cm³)") +
#   scale_color_manual(values = coral_colors) +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = coral_colors) +
#   theme_light() +
#   coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
#   theme(legend.position = "none",
#         title = element_text(size = 12))+
#   labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}') +
#   transition_states(year,
#     transition_length = 2,
#     state_length = 3) +
#   labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}')
# 
# animate(plot,
#         duration = 30,
#         fps = 25, height = 500, width = 2500, res = 300)


plot_data <- coral_dyn %>% 
  filter(x < 1,
         site == "LTER1",
         habitat == "OR",
         transect == "T01",
         !is.na(current_volume)) %>% 
  mutate(y_m = y / 100) 

plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x, y_m, group = coral_id)) +
  # base layer: all corals
  geom_point(aes(color = taxa_class, size = current_volume)) +
  # halo layer: only recruits, hollow ring
  geom_point(data = plot_data %>% filter(dyn_recruitment == 1),
             aes(size = current_volume),
             shape = 21,
             color = "#FFD700",     # gold — pops against pinks/reds
         #    color = "#39AD48",
             alpha = 0.6,
             fill  = NA,
             stroke = 2) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 10), name = "Volume (cm³)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = coral_colors) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = .1, xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_light() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14))+ 
      # axis.text = element_blank(),    # removes "0, 0.25, 0.5, ..." labels
      # axis.ticks = element_blank())   # removes the little tick marks too (optional)) +
  labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}', 
       x = "Transect Width (meters)", 
       y = "Transect Height (meters)", 
       ) + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1)) +
scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1)) +
  transition_states(year, transition_length = 2, state_length = 3)

animate(plot,
        duration = 20,
        fps = 15,
        height = 600,
        width  = 600,             # SQUARE — kills the smooshing
        res    = 120,
        renderer = gifski_renderer())   # smaller, sharper GIF

```

```{r}
final_anim <- animate(plot,
                      duration = 20,
                      fps = 20,                    # smoother motion
                      height = 1200,               # 2x your preview size
                      width = 1200,
                      res = 200,                   # higher DPI = sharper text/lines
                      renderer = gifski_renderer())

anim_save("/Users/vrs/MEDS/capstone/eds-coral-figs-storage/coral_recruits_LTER1_T01_wide.gif",
          animation = final_anim)


```
```{r}
plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x, y_m, group = coral_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = taxa_class, size = current_volume)) +
  geom_point(data = plot_data %>% filter(dyn_recruitment == 1),
             aes(size = current_volume),
             shape = 21,
             color = "#FFD700",
             fill  = NA,
             stroke = 2) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 10), name = "Volume (cm³)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = coral_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), minor_breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), minor_breaks = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +   # changed from coord_fixed
  theme_light() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14)) +
  labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}',
       x = "Transect width (m)",
       y = "Transect length (m)") +
  transition_states(year, transition_length = 2, state_length = 3)

animate(plot,
        duration = 20,
        fps = 20,
       width  = 1400,
height = 800,        # ratio ≈ 1.75:1        # short → rectangle
        res    = 150,
        renderer = gifski_renderer())

final_anim <- animate(plot,
                      duration = 20,
                      fps = 20,
                    width  = 1400,
                  height = 800,        # ratio ≈ 1.75:1         # shorter → rectangle
                      res    = 150,         # lowered slightly; 200 gets huge at this width
                      renderer = gifski_renderer())

anim_save("/Users/vrs/MEDS/capstone/eds-coral-figs-storage/coral_recruits_LTER1_T01_wide.gif",
          animation = final_anim)




```
